sizing_rule.note: Position size computed via optimal f derived from AHPR and SD. Investor selects unit basis (1-share, 100-share, or custom). In nonleveraged portfolios, weighting and quantity are synonymous. Sizing scales proportionally with chosen unit denomination.

source_rule_text: Position size can be computed on any basis unit (1-share, 100-share, or custom), with the investor dictating the size of one unit, and in nonleveraged situations weighting and quantity are synonymous.
